title: ffi: client_send_message fire-and-forget; relay errors invisible to Dart
description: ffi/src/api/client.rs client_send_message/client_send_whisper: these return Ok(()) once the message is enqueued in the local mpsc channel — NOT once the relay confirms delivery. Relay-side errors (subscription expired, malformed payload) arrive as events and are discarded in map_notification. The Dart caller cannot distinguish 'relay accepted the message' from 'message was enqueued locally'. This is fire-and-forget by design but is not documented in the Dart-facing API surface.
